cascade_issues.title: Power generation reduced
cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel reduces power generation capacity, potentially exceeding the power budget during imaging mode.

cascade_issues.title: Mass reduction below requirement
cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel reduces total mass, potentially causing a margin above the required limit.

cascade_issues.title: Thermal balance affected
cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel affects thermal distribution and may impact temperature stability across orbital cycles.

cascade_issues.title: Structural integrity compromised
cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel alters structural balance and may affect mechanical constraints such as vibration response.

missing_tests.activity: Redesign and retest power generation capacity
missing_tests.reason: Power generation is reduced, requiring a new test to ensure compliance with the power budget.
Thermal distribution is altered, requiring a new test to ensure compliance with temperature stability requirements.
Structural balance is altered, requiring a new test to ensure compliance with mechanical constraints.

TOTAL.power_budget_imaging: Current peak power generation reduced, margin recalculated.
